name: Services Supporting Weak TLS Cipher Suites
description: Identifies services that support weak or deprecated cipher suites (RC4, DES, 3DES, NULL ciphers)
query: SELECT id, hostname, port, cipher_suites FROM tls_endpoints WHERE cipher_suites && ARRAY['RC4', 'DES', '3DES', 'NULL', 'EXPORT', 'anon']
remediation: Disable weak cipher suites and configure the server to use only strong ciphers. Prefer AEAD ciphers like AES-GCM and ChaCha20-Poly1305.
